channel.title: TR-CERT (Computer Emergency Response Team of the Republic of Türkiye) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by TR-CERT (Computer Emergency Response Team of the Republic of Türkiye) (tr-cert).

image.title: TR-CERT (Computer Emergency Response Team of the Republic of Türkiye) — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-6509 · 7.8 HIGH — Privilege Escalation in TUBITAK BILGEM's Pardus Update
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in TUBITAK BILGEM Software Technologies Research Institute Pardus Update allows Privilege Escalation. This issue affects Pardus Update: from <=0.6.3 before 0.6.6.

item.title: CVE-2026-9085 · 8.8 HIGH — DNS Hijacking in TUBITAK BILGEM's Pardus-Parental-Control
item.description: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource, Improper Access Control vulnerability in TUBITAK BILGEM Software Technologies Research Institute Pardus-Parental-Control allows DNS Spoofing. This issue affects Pardus-Parental-Control: from <=0.…

item.title: CVE-2026-12386 · 3.9 LOW — Buffer Overflow in TUBITAK BILGEM's Pardus Pen
item.description: Improper null termination vulnerability in TUBITAK BILGEM Software Technologies Research Institute Pardus Pen allows Overflow Buffers. This issue affects Pardus Pen: from <=4.1.5 before 4.2.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-12250 · 7.9 HIGH — Sensitive Data Exposure in TUBITAK BILGEM's Pardus Domain Joiner
item.description: Invocation of process using visible sensitive information vulnerability in TUBITAK BILGEM Software Technologies Research Institute Pardus Domain Joiner allows Excavation. This issue affects Pardus Domain Joiner: from 0.5.2 before 0.5.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-14460 · 8.8 HIGH — Missing Authorization in TUBITAK BILGEM's pardus-software
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in TUBITAK BILGEM Software Technologies Research Institute pardus-software allows Argument Injection. This issue affects pardus-software: from <= 1.0.4 before 1.0.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-14459 · 8.8 HIGH — Argument Injection in TUBITAK BILGEM's pardus-software
item.description: Improper neutralization of argument delimiters in a command ('argument injection') vulnerability in TUBITAK BILGEM Software Technologies Research Institute pardus-software allows Argument Injection. This issue affects pardus-software: from <= 1.0.4 b…

item.title: CVE-2026-4322 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ 👻 — XSS in Raera's Destekz
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in Raera - Ankara Web Design and Digital Advertising Agency Destekz allows Reflected XSS. This issue affects Destekz: through 02062026. NOTE: The vendo…

item.title: CVE-2026-4321 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ 👻 — SQLi in Raera's Destekz
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in an SQL command ('SQL injection') vulnerability in Raera - Ankara Web Design and Digital Advertising Agency Destekz allows SQL Injection. This issue affects Destekz: through 02062026. NOTE: The vendo…

item.title: CVE-2026-4767 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Improper Access Control in TR7's WAF-ASP
item.description: Missing authentication for critical function vulnerability in TR7 Cyber ​​Defense Inc. WAF-ASP allows Authentication Abuse. This issue affects WAF-ASP: from v1.0.324.900 before v1.4.0.117.

item.title: CVE-2026-4772 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in TR7's WAF-ASP
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in TR7 Cyber ​​Defense Inc. WAF-ASP allows Stored XSS. This issue affects WAF-ASP: from v1.0.324.900 before v1.4.0.117.

item.title: CVE-2026-4770 · 4.6 MEDIUM — DOM-Based XSS in TR7's WAF-ASP
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in TR7 Cyber ​​Defense Inc. Web Application Firewall allows DOM-Based XSS. This issue affects Web Application Firewall: from v1.0.42.239 before v1.4.0.…

item.title: CVE-2026-6283 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in DivvyDrive Information Technologies' DivvyDrive
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in DivvyDrive Information Technologies Inc. DivvyDrive allows Stored XSS. This issue affects DivvyDrive: from v.4.8.2.23 before v.4.8.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-5220 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in DivvyDrive Information Technologies' DivvyDrive
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in DivvyDrive Information Technologies Inc. DivvyDrive allows Stored XSS. This issue affects DivvyDrive: from 4.8.2.23 before v.4.8.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-8403 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ 👻 — Stored XSS in Exagate's SYSGUARD 6001
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in Eksagate Electronic Engineering and Computer Industry Trade Inc. SYSGUARD 6001 allows Stored XSS. This issue affects SYSGUARD 6001: from 2.0.2 befor…

item.title: CVE-2026-8402 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ 👻 — SQLi in Exagate's SYSGUARD 6001
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in an SQL command ('SQL injection') vulnerability in Eksagate Electronic Engineering and Computer Industry Trade Inc. SYSGUARD 6001 allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects SYSGUARD 6001: from 2.…

item.title: CVE-2026-10857 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected XSS in Akinsoft's e-Commerce
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in AKIN Software Computer Import Export Industry and Trade Ltd. E-Commerce allows Reflected XSS. This issue affects e-Commerce: before 1.25.01.06.

item.title: CVE-2026-10711 · 8.8 HIGH — RCE in Akınsoft's CafePlus
item.description: Missing authentication for critical function vulnerability in AKIN Software Computer Import Export Industry and Trade Ltd. CafePlus allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs. This issue affects CafePlus: from 12.05.03 before 12.…

item.title: CVE-2026-5242 · 8.8 HIGH — Code Injection in Mia Technologies' Pizzy Library
item.description: Improper neutralization of formula elements in a CSV file vulnerability in MIA Technology Inc. Pizzy Library allows Code Injection. This issue affects Pizzy Library: from 1.0.0.26250 before 1.3.9.26250.

item.title: CVE-2026-5233 · 7.1 HIGH — Missing Rate Limiting in Mia Technologies' Pizzy Library
item.description: Improper Control of Interaction Frequency vulnerability in MIA Technology Inc. Pizzy Library allows Flooding. This issue affects Pizzy Library: from 1.0.0.26250 before 1.3.9.26250.

item.title: CVE-2026-5230 · 7.1 HIGH — Improper Access Control in Mia Technologies' Pizzy Library
item.description: Improper Access Control, Missing Authorization vulnerability in MIA Technology Inc. Pizzy Library allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Pizzy Library: from 1.0.0.26250 before 1.3.9.26250.

item.title: CVE-2026-5792 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass in Related Digital's Related Marketing Cloud (RMC)
item.description: Authentication bypass by spoofing vulnerability in Hedef Media Promotion Interactive Media Marketing Inc. Related Marketing Cloud (RMC) allows Brute Force. This issue affects Related Marketing Cloud (RMC): through 12052026.

item.title: CVE-2026-6211 · 8.7 HIGH — Arbitrary File Upload in Global IT's WEOLL
item.description: Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in Global IT Informatics Services Inc. WEOLL allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs. This issue affects WEOLL: from 2.0.9 before 3.2.45.33.

item.title: CVE-2026-6853 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — OTP Bypass in Başbelen Group's Pause+ Mobile App
item.description: Improper restriction of excessive authentication attempts vulnerability in Başbelen Group Food Cafe Businesses Industry and Trade Ltd. Co. Pause+ Mobile App allows Authentication Bypass. This issue affects Pause+ Mobile App: from v1.0.6 before v1.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-11839 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Arbitrary File Upload in Basarsoft's Rotaban
item.description: Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in Başarsoft Information Technologies Inc. Rotaban allows Upload a Web Shell to a Web Server. This issue affects Rotaban: from V2026.06.002 before V2026.06.003.

item.title: CVE-2026-11561 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SSTI in Soagen Informatics' Apinizer
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in an expression language statement ('expression language injection') vulnerability in Soagen Informatics Technologies Software and Consulting Inc. Apinizer allows Code Injection. This issue affects Ap…

item.title: CVE-2026-7852 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unrestricted File Upload in Limatek's LimRAD NAC
item.description: Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in Limatek System Inc. LimRAD NAC allows Remote Code Inclusion. This issue affects LimRAD NAC: before 5.5.7.3.9.

item.title: CVE-2026-8025 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ 👻 — SQLi in MOSK Informatics' CBS Platform
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in an SQL command ('SQL injection') vulnerability in MOSK Information Technologies Ltd. CBS Platform allows SQL Injection. This issue affects CBS Platform: through 09062026. NOTE: The vendor was contac…

item.title: CVE-2026-6274 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass in DTS Electronics' Redline WR3200
item.description: Improper Authentication, Missing authentication for critical function, Weak Authentication vulnerability in DTS Electronics Industry and Trade Ltd. Co. Redline WR3200 allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs. This issue affects…

item.title: CVE-2026-5228 · 8.8 HIGH — Improper Access Control in Kurt Software Studio's WriteUp Mobile App
item.description: Improper Access Control, Missing Authorization vulnerability in Kurt Software Studio WriteUp Mobile App allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs. This issue affects WriteUp Mobile App: from 1.3.0 through 04062026.

item.title: CVE-2026-4104 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SQLi in Akmer Informatics' TeknoPass
item.description: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled SQL primary key vulnerability in Akmer Informatics Automation Industry and Trade Ltd. Co. TeknoPass allows SQL Injection. This issue affects TeknoPass: from 20210501 through 20260429.

item.title: CVE-2026-1816 · 6.3 MEDIUM — OTP Bypass in TEİAŞ's Mobile Application
item.description: Improper restriction of excessive authentication attempts vulnerability in Turkiye Electricity Transmission Corporation (TEİAŞ) Mobile Application allows Brute Force. This issue affects Mobile Application: from 1.6.2 before 1.13.

item.title: CVE-2026-1815 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Session Hijacking in TEİAŞ's Mobile Application
item.description: Insufficient session expiration vulnerability in Turkiye Electricity Transmission Corporation (TEİAŞ) Mobile Application allows Session Hijacking. This issue affects Mobile Application: from 1.6.2 before 1.13.

item.title: CVE-2025-13479 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — IDOR in PosCube's QR Menu
item.description: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in PosCube Hardware Software and Consulting Ltd. QR Menu allows Exploitation of Trusted Identifiers. This issue affects QR Menu: through 21052026. NOTE: The vendor was contacted early abo…

item.title: CVE-2025-13477 · 7.1 HIGH — OTP Bypass in Digital Operation Services' WifiBurada
item.description: Exposure of private personal information to an unauthorized actor, Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability in Digital Operations Services Inc. WifiBurada allows Authentication Bypass. This issue affects WifiBurada: through 21052026. NOTE:…

item.title: CVE-2026-5783 · 7.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Reflected XSS in Beyaz Computer's CityPLus
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in Beyaz Computer Software Design Industry and Trade Ltd. Co. CityPLus allows Reflected XSS. This issue affects CityPLus: before V24.29750.1.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-11954 · 8 HIGH — CSRF in Sitemio's WISECP
item.description: Cross-Site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Sitemio Information Technologies Trade Ltd. Co. WISECP allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects WISECP: through 20022026. NOTE: The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but d…

item.title: CVE-2026-7498 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Stored XSS in Basamak Informatics' DernekWeb
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in Basamak Information Technology Consulting and Organization Trade Ltd. Co. DernekWeb allows Stored XSS. This issue affects DernekWeb: through 3012202…

item.title: CVE-2025-15024 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — RCE in Yordam Informatics' Library Automation System
item.description: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in Yordam Information Technology Consulting, Training and Electronic Systems Industry and Trade Inc. Library Automation System allows Remote Code Inclusion. This issue affects Li…

item.title: CVE-2025-15023 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper Access Control in Yordam Informatics' Library Automation System
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Yordam Information Technology Consulting, Training and Electronic Systems Industry and Trade Inc. Library Automation System allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue a…

item.title: CVE-2025-15025 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — IDOR in Yordam Informatics' Library Automation System
item.description: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in Yordam Information Technology Consulting, Training and Electronic Systems Industry and Trade Inc. Library Automation System allows Exploitation of Trusted Identifiers. This issue affec…

item.title: CVE-2025-12008 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — IDOR in APPYAP's Yaay Social Media App
item.description: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in APPYAP Technology and Information Inc. Yaay Social Media App allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs. This issue affects Yaay Social Media App: from 3.8.0 throu…

item.title: CVE-2026-6008 · 6.8 MEDIUM — IDOR in Im Park's DijiDemi
item.description: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in Im Park Information Technology, Electronics, Press, Publishing and Advertising, Education Ltd. Co. DijiDemi allows Privilege Abuse. This issue affects DijiDemi: from v4.5.12.1 before v…

item.title: CVE-2026-2347 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — IDOR in Akıllı Ticaret's E-Commerce Pack
item.description: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in Akilli Commerce Software Technologies Ltd. Co. E-Commerce Website allows Session Hijacking. This issue affects E-Commerce Website: before 4.5.001.

item.title: CVE-2025-11024 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SQLi in Akıllı Ticaret's E-Commerce Pack
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in an SQL command ('SQL injection') vulnerability in Akilli Commerce Software Technologies Ltd. Co. E-Commerce Website allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects E-Commerce Website: before 4.5.001.

item.title: CVE-2026-2465 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper Authorization in E-Kalite's Turboard FOR-S
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in E-Kalite Software Hardware Engineering Design and Internet Services Industry and Trade Ltd. Co. Turboard FOR-S allows Privilege Escalation. This issue affects Turboard FOR-S: from 7.01.2026 before 18.02.2026.

item.title: CVE-2026-6001 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — IDOR in Abis Technology's BAPSİS
item.description: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in ABIS Technology Ltd. Co. BAPSİS allows Exploitation of Trusted Identifiers. This issue affects BAPSİS: before v.202604152042.

item.title: CVE-2025-6577 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SQLi in Akilli Commerce's E-Commerce Website
item.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in an SQL command ('SQL injection') vulnerability in Akilli Commerce Software Technologies Ltd. Co. E-Commerce Website allows SQL Injection. This issue affects E-Commerce Website: before 4.5.001.

item.title: CVE-2025-14341 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Input Data Manipulation in DivvyDrive Information Technologies' DivvyDrive
item.description: Improperly controlled modification of Dynamically-Determined object attributes, Allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability in DivvyDrive Information Technologies Inc. DivvyDrive allows Excessive Allocation, Flooding. This issu…

item.title: CVE-2026-6795 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Open Redirect in DivvyDrive Information Technologies' DivvyDrive
item.description: URL redirection to untrusted site ('open redirect') vulnerability in DivvyDrive Information Technologies Inc. DivvyDrive allows Parameter Injection. This issue affects DivvyDrive: from 4.8.2.9 before 4.8.3.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-5784 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Stored XSS in DivvyDrive Information Technologies' DivvyDrive
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in DivvyDrive Information Technologies Inc. DivvyDrive allows Stored XSS. This issue affects DivvyDrive: from 4.8.2.9 before 4.8.3.2.
